finalMessage.result:
I see - I need to wait for you to grant permission to read these files. The crewchief CLI has code for creating git worktrees in the following locations:

1. `/workspace/packages/cli/src/git/worktrees.ts` - Core worktree management functions
2. `/workspace/packages/cli/src/cli/worktree.ts` - CLI command interface
3. `/workspace/packages/cli/src/utils/worktree-metadata.ts` - Metadata handling for worktrees

Could you please grant me permission to read these files so I can explain how the git worktree creation works?

tool_input.command: find /workspace -name "worktrees.ts" -type f | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".crewchief" | head -5
tool_input.description: Find worktrees.ts files excluding nested dirs
